name: Nocturne Minimal Analytics

meta.confidence_notes: High confidence on palette, spacing rhythm, and chart treatment; medium confidence on exact font family.

visual_dna.contrast_strategy: very dark surfaces + selective high-contrast text + one neon/violet accent
visual_dna.visual_hierarchy: chart first, report rows second, CTA third

interaction_principles: chart hover tooltip appears with short fade

layout_system.canvas: centered floating panel on muted backdrop

components.name: Top breadcrumb bar
components.notes: Tiny icon + breadcrumb with subtle muted text

components.name: Line chart panel
components.notes: Thin violet stroke, low-contrast grid, floating tooltip

components.name: Report rows
components.notes: Rounded rows with tiny category dots and avatar stack

components.name: Primary CTA
components.notes: Small bright violet button anchored bottom-right

interaction_patterns.hover: increase border contrast + slight surface lift
interaction_patterns.error: inline alert strip using danger token

behavior: Below md: stack controls vertically and reduce chart label density
Below sm: convert report rows to compact cards
Keep primary CTA always visible in footer area

dark_mode_rules.light_mode_mapping: invert neutrals while preserving violet accent saturation
dark_mode_rules.contrast_target: WCAG AA for body text and control text

accessibility.keyboard: all controls reachable; chart tooltips mirrored in accessible summary
accessibility.focus_visibility: never remove outlines without tokenized replacement
accessibility.aria_guidance: use role='table' for report list only when semantics match

implementation_rules: No hardcoded design literals in feature components
Only consume colors from theme tokens
Encapsulate chart styles in reusable chart theme object
Use shared button/input/badge primitives for consistency
anti_patterns: Multiple saturated accents competing with violet
Heavy drop shadows that break low-noise mood
Dense copy blocks in compact rows
